race.description: Tabtouch Past The Post Payouts Maiden
race.comment: ARRANGEMENT (11) was disappointing on debut when favourite, beaten 5L on the Scarpside course here most recently. The inside draw may suit him much better today and the experience will do him the world of good. Had trialled sharply prior to his debut and he show what he's capable of here. Stablemate MIDNIGHT STAR (12) flew home to just miss at Geraldton two back before running on strongly behind a good winner last time out over this trip. That form may get a good push in the opening event of the day and this looks to shape similarly. Can't be discounted with Parnham staying on board. BLUE LUPIN (7) flew home to just miss over 1400m on the Scarpside here 17 days ago and jumps straight to 1600m now. He'll need some luck from the draw, but he laid good foundations fresh. Won't be far away. BEYOND THE LIMITS (8) can improve out in trip now. MAGIC CARATS (1) is next best.
